#### 5.75. Scan devices

Internal system in the Default domain domain.

Status: live

**In diagrams**:

- [Post office management App Diagram](#2.7.-post-office-management-app-diagram)

to scan package barcodes and send tracking updates to the system.

When a package moves:

- Arrives at sorting center
- Leaves sorting center
- Out for delivery
- Delivered
